data.title: Partnership between OSU and IronCircle to provide AI-powered cybersecurity training for adults.
data.description: IronCircle has announced a partnership with The Ohio State University to provide enhanced access to practical, AI-driven cybersecurity education for adult learners and professionals. This joint effort aims to offer immersive training experiences focusing on developing tangible skills in the realm of cybersecurity.

data.title: Pediatric Therapeutic Services rebrands as Kelly Pediatric Therapy, aiming to address therapist shortages and access barriers in growing pediatric therapy demand.
data.description: The organization has undergone a rebranding, now operating under the unified Kelly brand. This strategic move combines their expertise in pediatric therapy to better address the increasing demand for such services. This rebranding effort aims to streamline operations and enhance their ability to cater to a larger clientele seeking pediatric therapy services.

data.title: Blue Owl Capital Inc. received 7 awards in 2025, including 3 in the PERE Awards and 4 in the Infrastructure Investor Awards.
data.description: Today, on March 4, 2026, Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) revealed its recent success in the 2025 Private Equity Real Estate (PERE) Awards and the 2025 Infrastructure Investor Awards. The company received a total of seven awards, with three in PERE and four in Infrastructure Investor. These accolades mark the highest number of honors attained by a single company in these prestigious award ceremonies.

data.title: Olé Cocktail Co. extends partnership with ASICS Los Angeles Marathon, emphasizing active lifestyle, with a focus on premium real tequila cocktails and mocktails.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, the ASICS Los Angeles Marathon, organized by The McCourt Foundation, revealed that Olé Cocktail Co.(TM) will be back as an official partner. Olé Cocktail Co. is a renowned premium tequila cocktail and mocktail brand under Mark Anthony Brands.

data.title: Top advisors from Bayleys in New Zealand and Fiji have joined REALM network, connecting with UHNW clients. (Characters: 95)
data.description: In Jackson, Wyoming on March 4, 2026, REALM®, a private global network and technology platform linking top real estate advisors with ultra-high-net-worth clients, revealed that premier advisors from Bayleys have become part of its exclusive real estate network.

data.title: Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital named hospital of the month by SPS for patient and employee safety.
data.description: In Hollywood, Florida, on February 24, 2026, Joe DiMaggio Children's Hospital has been honored as the hospital of the month by Children's Hospitals' Solutions for Patient Safety (SPS). They have been acknowledged for prioritizing safety in every patient encounter, raising the standard of care in the process.

data.title: Drivers at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits in Springfield unanimously join Teamsters Local 245, seeking better benefits.
data.description: In Springfield, Missouri, all 20 drivers at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits have unanimously decided to be represented by Teamsters Local 245. This decision was made on March 4, 2026. The drivers are seeking improved benefits and seniority through this new representation.

data.title: LangChain enhances Claude Code performance from 17% to 92% on AI tasks with new CLI tools and skills system.
data.description: LangChain has recently introduced a set of new Command Line Interface (CLI) tools and a skills system to enhance the capabilities of AI coding agents within the LangSmith ecosystem. This development significantly boosts the agents' efficiency in tasks related to tracing and evaluation. Users can access more information by clicking on the provided link.

data.title: OpenAI debuts Codex desktop app on Windows after macOS launch, helping devs manage many AI coding agents with enhanced automation.
data.description: OpenAI has broadened its Codex desktop application to Windows, granting developers access to control numerous AI coding agents simultaneously. This allows for enhanced automation capabilities. The move is significant with an increasing number of developers using the platform, now able to work more efficiently and manage more tasks at once. The expansion to Windows opens up opportunities for even more developers to utilize the technology, maximizing productivity.
Israeli Air Force has begun an additional wave of strikes targeting military infrastructure belonging to the Iranian regime across Tehran.

data.title: New LangChain Skills framework elevates Claude Code's AI agent performance from 29% to 95%, a significant boost.
data.description: LangChain has unveiled a groundbreaking Skills framework that significantly enhances Claude Code's capacity to develop AI agents. The technology allows a remarkable increase in task completion rate from 29% to an impressive 95%. This advancement marks a substantial leap in the efficiency and effectiveness of AI development.
